title: EStopOn Property, Spel Class
description: Returns status of the controller's emergency stop status.
see_also:
PauseOn, SafetyOn

EStopOn Example

VB Example:

If m_spel.EStopOn Then

    lblEStop.Text = "Emergency stop is active"

Else

    lblEStop.Text = ""

EndIf

C#
examples:
If m_spel.EStopOn Then
    lblEStop.Text = "Emergency stop is active"
Else
    lblEStop.Text = ""
EndIf
